mapper.insert: insert into `course`(course_name, course_code, teacher_id, credit, semester, total_weeks, attendance_required_count, exam_qualification_rate, description, create_time, update_time) values (#{courseName}, #{courseCode}, #{teacherId}, #{credit}, #{semester}, #{totalWeeks}, #{attendanceRequiredCount}, #{examQualificationRate}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
